title: erigeron stenophyllus
intro: Erigeron stenophyllus, also known as the narrow-leaved fleabane, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Erigeron stenophyllus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the latter being particularly useful in topical applications for skin conditions and injuries.
